svg.text: erosion.rs — the fastest-growing terrain mode of one epoch, creep OFF vs creep ON (L19)
Power iteration on the epoch map (I + ∂Δh/∂h) over a real land patch. Both grow — and both grow at LONG wavelength, along
channels. That is valley formation: the stream-power/drainage feedback, which is the physics the kernel exists to produce.
Neither mode is a checkerboard, and there is no null space.
